## Purpose

Try to earn relevant free or near-free traffic for the validation surface.

## Required Output

- pain language map
- search intent map
- community prospecting map
- thread scorecards
- free value wedge
- organic distribution test plan
- traffic attempts
- traffic source report

## Acceptance Criteria

- every public action has approval or a blocked state
- every attempt links to the exact surface version
- no action outside Gate A constraints, spam, or fake engagement occurred
- traffic source quality is recorded
